name: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Ultra
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Ultra
description: The UniFi Switch Ultra (USW-Ultra) is a compact Layer 2 managed switch designed for flexible edge deployments where space, power options, and mounting versatility are critical. The switch features 8 Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 ports, including 7 PoE+ output ports for powering connected devices and 1 PoE++ input port that allows the switch itself to be powered over Ethernet. With its compact desktop form factor, the USW-Ultra can be installed on a desk, mounted on a wall, or attached using the integrated magnetic mounting option... Despite its small size, the UniFi Switch Ultra delivers reliable performance for modern Gigabit networks... Management is handled through the UniFi Network application (version 8.0.28 or later), providing centralized configuration, monitoring, and firmware updates via Ethernet.

detailed_description.heading: Compact PoE Switch
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Switch Ultra (USW-Ultra) is a compact Layer 2 managed switch designed for flexible edge deployments where space, power options, and mounting versatility are critical. The switch features 8 Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 ports, including 7 PoE+ output ports for powering connected devices and 1 PoE++ input port that allows the switch itself to be powered over Ethernet... Total PoE availability depends on the power source, ranging from 16 W with PoE+ input to 202 W when powered by a 210 W AC adapter.

detailed_description.heading: Gigabit Performance
detailed_description.text: Despite its small size, the UniFi Switch Ultra delivers reliable performance for modern Gigabit networks. It offers a switching capacity of 16 Gbps and a total non-blocking throughput of 8 Gbps... Support for up to 256 VLANs enables logical network segmentation... Advanced Layer 2 features help maintain network stability and control traffic behavior. These include STP and RSTP for loop prevention, loop protection, and port isolation.

detailed_description.heading: Power & Management
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Switch Ultra is designed around flexible power and simplified management. It can be powered either via PoE++ input or through an external AC/DC adapter (sold separately)... Management is handled through the UniFi Network application (version 8.0.28 or later), providing centralized configuration, monitoring, and firmware updates via Ethernet.
